mapper.select: SELECT pa.*, p.title AS project_title FROM project_application pa LEFT JOIN project p ON pa.project_id = p.id WHERE pa.id = #{id}
SELECT pa.*, p.title AS project_title FROM project_application pa LEFT JOIN project p ON pa.project_id = p.id WHERE pa.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY pa.create_time DESC
SELECT pa.*, p.title AS project_title FROM project_application pa LEFT JOIN project p ON pa.project_id = p.id WHERE pa.applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY pa.create_time DESC

SELECT pa.*, p.title AS project_title FROM project_application pa LEFT JOIN project p ON pa.project_id = p.id WHERE pa.approver_role = #{approverRole} AND pa.approval_status = 'PENDING' AND pa.status = 1 ORDER BY pa.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_application ( application_no, project_id, project_title, applicant_id, applicant_name, applicant_role, application_type, desired_position, applicant_college_id, applicant_college_name, applicant_major, application_content, qualifications, resume_url, contact_phone, contact_email, approval_status, approver_role, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{applicationNo}, #{projectId}, #{projectTitle}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantRole}, #{applicationType}, #{desiredPosition}, #{applicantCollegeId}, #{applicantCollegeName}, #{applicantMajor}, #{applicationContent}, #{qualifications}, #{resumeUrl}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{approvalStatus}, #{approverRole}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
